description: Golden-hash fixture for CI: records the expected content_hash of the eiaa playbook at a known commit.  If this hash drifts, tests/test_canonicalize.py::test_golden_hash_fixture fails, alerting implementers that the canonical form or playbook content changed. Re-run `python3 scripts/canonicalize.py --record` to update after an intentional playbook-content change.
canonicalization_rule: canonical = playbook JSON minus playbook.status and playbook.release, serialized with sort_keys=True, separators=(',', ':'), UTF-8.
